entries.description: Center for Countering Digital Hate analysis: Over 11-day period (Dec 29, 2025 - Jan 9, 2026), Grok generated approximately 3 million sexualized images, including an estimated 23,000 images depicting apparent children, at a rate of ~190 sexualized images per minute and one image depicting apparent children every 41 seconds
entries.causation_evidence: Center for Countering Digital Hate report; New York Times coverage

entries.description: Tennessee criminal case: Individual arrested for using Grok to generate explicit content of at least 18 underage girls by manipulating real photos, including school photographs and family pictures
entries.causation_evidence: Class action lawsuit filing; police investigation records

entries.description: European Union launches formal investigation into Grok's image generation capabilities regarding non-consensual deepfake content
Grok image generation feature launched on X platform with content moderation based on X's existing policies and staffing levels
entries.causation_evidence: X platform announcements; Australian eSafety Commission documentation of platform staffing levels
